message:
fix(node): numeric safety in federation reciprocity and audit hash completeness

atc_reciprocity:
- Clamp contribution_quality to [0.0, 1.0] with NaN/Infinity guard
  (fail-closed: non-finite quality treated as 0.0)
- Replace bare += 1 and wrapping_add(1) on audit counters with
  saturating_add(1) for consistency with project-wide hardening

approval_workflow:
- Include signature field in policy change audit entry hash computation;
  previously the hash covered all fields except signature, allowing an
  entry's signature to be swapped without changing the hash chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
